types:type.name: auto_5524027d-b875-4727-82fe-c128103886e3_Input-Payload

%dw 2.0
type auto_5524027d_b875_4727_82fe_c128103886e3_Input_Payload = {| productCode: String, productId: String, description?: String, currencyCode?: String, productName: String, productPrice: Number |} {"description": "Request payload for creating a new Product in Salesforce CRM"}

types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type auto_bcacd3bc_158a_4a4a_b2a3_7f1f4f82772b_Input_Payload = {| description?: String, currencyCode?: String, productName?: String, productPrice?: Number |} {"description": "Request payload for partially updating an existing Product.\nNote: productCode field is NOT allowed in update operations.\n"}
